title: Assign Currency to Account
user_story: As an Active Recorder, I want to assign a currency to each account when I create it, so that all balances and transactions for that account are shown in the correct currency.
acceptance_criteria: The account creation form includes a currency selector showing common ISO 4217 currencies
The currency is mandatory — an account cannot be created without a currency
The selected currency is displayed on the account card in the account list
Once set, the currency of an account cannot be changed (to preserve historical accuracy)
